/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ahfl_tooling_package_tests.dir/unit/tooling/package/package.cpp.o -o ahfl_tooling_package_tests  ../src/tooling/package/libahfl_tooling_package.a ../src/base/support/libahfl_base_support.a ../src/base/json/libahfl_base_json.a
